commands.review_summary:
The PR downgrades completed nonzero package post-install doctor results to advisory warnings so package updates can continue into fresh post-core plugin convergence, while keeping killed or timed-out doctor runs fatal.

PR surface: Source +58, Tests +141. Total +199 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main turns a completed nonzero package post-verify doctor step into the package update `failedStep`, which prevents the fresh post-core process from launching. I did not run a live package update in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review is needed for the advisory doctor policy and the contributor must supply real package-update proof; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue from this review.

target.title: fix(update): continue after package doctor warnings
target.body:
## Summary

- Downgrade completed nonzero package post-install `openclaw doctor --fix` results to an advisory update step after the package install has already been verified.
- Keep killed/timed-out doctor runs fatal so interrupted repairs do not continue into plugin convergence or gateway restart.
- Surface advisory doctor stderr in both live progress and printed update summaries, then continue into the fresh post-core update process.

## Verification

- `pnpm format:fix src/cli/update-cli.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean: no accepted/actionable findings)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Package updates that successfully install and verify a new core package but hit a completed post-install doctor repair warning no longer strand later post-core plugin convergence and gateway restart.

Real environment tested: Local Codex worktree on macOS using the repo Vitest wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: The focused update CLI suite passed with 131 tests, including regressions for completed doctor warning continuation and killed doctor failure.

Observed result after fix: Completed nonzero doctor exit is printed as an advisory warning and the updated root launches the post-core update child; killed doctor output preserves a fatal update exit and does not launch post-core work.

What was not tested: A live package update against a real installed gateway was not run in this branch.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
